source_commit_note: Read from master of CIRWEL/unitares-paper-v6 as of 2026-04-23; frozen by v7 F-hat Session 1a
form: linear g_I(I) = gamma_I * I (spec v4 §2.3 discretization)
notes: Spec §2.3 drops the gamma_E ||delta-eta||^2 drift term from the v6 E equation; prior has 9 params.
gamma_I_linear (0.169) is the linear-mode value. Paper App A also lists gamma_I (logistic) = 0.25; the spec uses the linear form, so 0.169 is the binding value.

These values differ from config/governance_config.py (alpha=0.5, beta_I=0.05, gamma_I=0.3). Paper is source of truth per memory feedback_eisv-bounds-drift.md. Runtime config divergence should be reconciled separately.

hash_protocol.input: parameters dict, serialized via json.dumps(sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':')) on UTF-8 bytes
hash_protocol.verification: Session 2 MUST recompute on the live ode_params.json at dispatch time; mismatch aborts horse race per spec §2.5
